title: Front Door Skills
description: Start here when the request is broad, needs triage, or should route through the shortest high-signal entry point.

title: Document API And Navigation
description: Use these when the work centers on creating documents, ObjId navigation, reading/writing maps, lists, and text.

title: Codable Mapping
description: Use these when encoding or decoding Swift Codable types to/from Automerge documents.

title: Sync And Collaboration
description: Use these when syncing documents, forking, merging, tracking history, or building collaborative features.

title: API Reference
description: Use these for exact method signatures, type definitions, and dense lookup.
